rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow a user to register by entering their details.
The system shall issue a member ID and complete the registration upon correct entry of details.
The system shall require the user to re-enter their details upon incorrect entry of details.
The system shall allow a user to log in after successful registration using their member ID and password.
The system shall allow the user to continue upon correct entry of member ID and password during login. Otherwise, they cannot log in.
The system shall allow a user to search for a book by entering its details.
The system shall show suggestions if a book is found during a search; otherwise, it shall allow the user to choose another option.
The system shall allow a user to get a book by entering its ID and their member ID.
The system shall allow the user to get the book if their membership is active; otherwise, it shall require them to pay the fine amount first.
The system shall allow a user to buy a book by entering its ID and seeing the price.
The system shall provide the book if the user pays; otherwise, it shall end the process there.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can register by entering their details.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they register, they first enter their details.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Upon correct entry of details during registration, a member ID is issued and the registration is completed.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the details are correct, they receive a member ID and complete the registration.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Upon incorrect entry of details during registration, the user must re-enter their details.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the details are wrong, they have to enter them again.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After successful registration, a user can log in using their member ID and password.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After registration, they can log in.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Upon correct entry of member ID and password during login, the user can continue. Otherwise, they cannot log in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If both are correct, they can continue. If not, they cannot log in.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can search for a book by entering its details.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When searching for a book, they enter the book details.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If a book is found during a search, suggestions are shown. If not, the user chooses another option.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the book is found, suggestions are shown. If it is not found, they choose another option.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can get a book by entering its ID and their member ID.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: To get a book, they enter the book ID and then their member ID.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the user's membership is active, they can get the book. Otherwise, they must pay the fine amount first.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If their membership is active, they can get the book. If their membership is inactive, they must pay the fine amount first.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can buy a book by entering its ID and seeing the price.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: To buy a book, they enter the book ID and see the price.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the user pays for the book, they receive it. Otherwise, the process ends there.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they pay, they get the book. If they do not pay, it ends there.
